prompts.analyze_clothing_item_simple:
Analyze this clothing item photo and return ONLY raw JSON (no markdown, no code blocks, no explanation).

{
  "itemType": "jacket|shirt|pants|skirt|dress|shoes|accessory|etc",
  "description": "Brief visual description (color, style, material) - max 20 words",
  "color": "Primary color name",
  "colorHex": "#hexcode",
  "style": "casual|formal|sporty|vintage|modern|bohemian|etc",
  "season": ["spring", "summer", "fall", "winter"],
  "occasion": ["everyday", "business", "formal", "sportswear", "outdoor"]
}

CRITICAL:
- Focus ONLY on the main clothing item visible
- Keep description under 20 words
- Return raw JSON object directly (do NOT wrap in ```json```)
- No markdown formatting, no code blocks
- Just the pure JSON object starting with { and ending with }
prompts.analyze_scene_items:
You are analyzing one full outfit photo (do NOT crop). Detect all visible fashion items and return ONLY raw JSON.

Return this exact structure:
{
  "summary": "One-sentence summary of the outfit scene (max 20 words)",
  "items": [
    {
      "category": "top|bottom|hat|shoes|accessory",
      "label": "Korean short label (예: 티셔츠, 치마, 스니커즈, 볼캡)",
      "description": "Short visual description (max 15 words)"
    }
  ]
}

Rules:
- Use the full image context
- Include only clearly visible items
- If a category is absent, do not add it
- Return strict raw JSON only
- No markdown, no code blocks, no explanation
prompts.generate_coordination_prompt:
Create a detailed Stability AI prompt for generating a mannequin outfit photo.

Selected items:
Top: {top_description}
Bottom: {bottom_description}
Shoes: {shoes_description}

Generate a prompt that produces a professional fashion catalog image showing these items coordinated together on a faceless mannequin.

IMPORTANT:
- Describe each item's key visual features (color, material, style)
- Specify: front view, standing straight, arms at sides, white background, studio lighting
- Keep under 150 words
- Return ONLY the prompt text (no JSON, no explanation, no quotes)

Example output:
Professional fashion photograph showing charcoal gray wool blazer with notched lapel and two buttons, navy blue slim-fit dress pants with flat front, and brown leather oxford shoes coordinated together on a faceless mannequin, front view, standing straight with arms naturally at sides, clean pure white seamless background, soft professional studio lighting, catalog quality, sharp focus, product photography style
prompts.evolve_avatar:
You are helping create a simple body reference for clothing coordination decisions.

CRITICAL RULES:
1. Keep the base mannequin style completely
2. Make MINIMAL changes - only slight silhouette adjustments
3. Maintain the same pose, background, and overall structure
4. Body type reference: {body_type}
5. If uncertain, prefer NO change over wrong change

Task: Adjust the base mannequin's silhouette VERY SLIGHTLY toward the reference photo's proportions.
Focus on: shoulder width, waist-hip ratio, overall body shape balance.

OUTPUT REQUIREMENT:
- Return ONLY a PNG image (no text).
- Do NOT include explanations or commentary.

Generate the adjusted image maintaining the mannequin's visual style.
